name: quality-large
description: Full quality assurance team with specialists for security, accessibility, and release management

agents.name: QA Engineer
agents.goal: Identify defects and ensure code quality

agents.name: Test Automation Engineer
agents.goal: Create and maintain automated test suites

agents.name: Senior QA Engineer
agents.goal: Lead test strategy and review quality metrics across the project

agents.name: Performance Tester
agents.goal: Profile application performance and identify bottlenecks

agents.name: Security Tester
agents.goal: Identify security vulnerabilities through static and dynamic analysis

agents.name: Accessibility Tester
agents.goal: Ensure compliance with accessibility standards and guidelines
